razorpay_js_initialization.note: ChatGPT runtime initializes Razorpay.js with merchant's public key_id

tokenize_new_card.note: Raw PAN and CVV encrypted by Razorpay.js in browser; never leave runtime unencrypted

list_saved_cards.note: Runtime surfaces saved cards from Token HQ for returning buyers

select_saved_card.note: Buyer selects saved card; runtime only needs CVV for debit cards

risk_signals.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X)

body.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (iPhone; CPU iPhone OS 17_0 like Mac OS X)

frictionless_response_no_3ds.note: Bank approved without 3DS challenge; runtime immediately calls complete_checkout

challenge_response_3ds_required.note: Bank requires 3DS; runtime renders ACS URL in inline iframe

security.isolation: No parent-frame JS access to iframe content
security.input: Buyer enters OTP/biometric in secure iframe within conversation

webhook_payment_authorized.merchant_action: Optionally auto-capture; or capture separately via POST /v1/payments/{id}/capture

webhook_payment_captured.merchant_action: Extract order_id from notes → look up acp_checkout_id → call complete_checkout MCP tool

webhook_payment_failed.merchant_action: Update checkout status to canceled; surface error via get_checkout response

error_invalid_token.message: Card token expired or invalid. Please re-enter card details.
error_invalid_token.resolution: Prompt re-tokenization via card entry UI

error_cvv_required.message: CVV required for this transaction. Please enter CVV.

error_insufficient_funds.message: Card has insufficient balance. Please use another card or payment method.
error_insufficient_funds.resolution: Suggest alternative card or payment method

error_card_declined.message: Bank declined the transaction. Please retry or use another card.

error_3ds_auth_failed.message: OTP incorrect or expired. Please retry with resend if available.
error_3ds_auth_failed.resolution: Offer retry (resend OTP if bank permits)

error_card_expired.message: Card has expired. Please enter valid card details.
error_card_expired.resolution: Prompt card re-entry with valid card

error_daily_limit.message: Daily card limit reached. Please try again tomorrow or use another card.
error_daily_limit.resolution: Suggest tomorrow retry or alternative card

error_international_blocked.message: International transactions not allowed on this card. Please use domestic card or UPI.
error_international_blocked.resolution: Suggest domestic card or UPI alternative

token_hq_coft_compliance.description: All India-issued cards tokenized via Razorpay Token HQ; raw PANs replaced with network tokens

lifecycle.step_1: First-time entry: Raw PAN encrypted by Razorpay.js; Token HQ issues token_id
lifecycle.step_2: Storage: Token stored against customer_id; raw PAN never written to merchant or ACP
lifecycle.step_3: Subsequent purchase: Runtime retrieves token_id from Token HQ; no PAN re-entry needed
lifecycle.step_4: S2S charge: Merchant calls POST /v1/payments with token_id; Razorpay de-tokenizes internally
lifecycle.step_5: Auto-refresh: Razorpay auto-refreshes tokens on network updates (card replacement, expiry)

security.no_pan_in_acp: Raw card numbers MUST NOT appear in any ACP MCP tool call or log
security.cvv_encrypted: CVV encrypted by Razorpay.js before transmission; never stored
security.token_binding: token_id bound to customer_id + merchant; cross-merchant reuse blocked

frictionless_flow: 1. Widget calls requestCheckout with payment_type: s2s_card
2. Runtime renders card UI and tokenizes via Razorpay.js
3. Runtime calls charge_card MCP tool with token_id
4. Merchant creates order + initiates S2S charge
challenge_flow: 5. Bank requires 3DS; Razorpay returns ACS URL
7. Runtime renders 3DS challenge in inline iframe
10. Runtime polls get_checkout for final status
